query:
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'admin_users' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
id	int
password	varchar
name	varchar
active	tinyint
createdAt	timestamp
lastLogin	timestamp
username	varchar
isOwner	tinyint
campaignId	int
needsPasswordChange	tinyint
